title: Section 0 last bullet references a different prompt's output
description: Line 48-49: 'Could the type system have prevented any bug found in Section 0 of a correctness review?' This references PROMPT-review-upstream.md's Section 0, as if the two prompts are always run together. LANG-DESIGN is a standalone mode. Fix: either remove this bullet, or rewrite it as a self-contained question: 'Are there bug classes (null dereference, invalid state, wrong-type argument, wrong-order call) that the type system could have statically prevented, but didn't? If yes, that is a type design failure, not just a code bug.'
close_reason: All four PROMPT-review-lang.md fixes applied in one pass.
